title: National Para Athletics Championship
description: Our athletes have secured multiple medals at the National level. From training in rural districts to the podium at National stadiums, the journey of our champions continues to inspire us all.
details:
ASFA participated in the 17th National Para Athletics Championship held in Mumbai. Our contingent consisted of 12 athletes from rural backgrounds.

Key achievements:
- 5 Gold Medals in Track Events
- 3 Silver Medals in Field Events
- New State Record in Javelin Throw
- Qualified for Asian Para Games

This victory has opened doors for international exposure. Two of our medalists have been selected for the National coaching camp in Bangalore.
coachQuote: Their success is proof that consistent training and rural grit can conquer any stadium in the world.
